query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
               (u.prompt_tokens * cm.input_usd_per_mtok
                + u.completion_tokens * cm.output_usd_per_mtok) / 1000000
           ), 0)::numeric AS "cost!"
           FROM usage_daily u
           JOIN chat_models cm ON cm.model = u.model
           WHERE u.user_id = $1 AND u.course_id = $2 AND u.date = CURRENT_DATE
